channel.title: Provisioned V2 on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Provisioned V2 on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Azure Data Box now supports Azure Files Provisioned v2
item.description:
Azure Data Box now supports ingesting data into Azure Files Provisioned v2 storage accounts. Azure Files Provisioned v2 lets customers provision and pay for specific capacity, IOPS, and throughput.

  • Source: Azure Updates
